name: How Can I Help
description: Detects standard support greeting offering help to the customer.

response.content: Thank you for reaching out! I'm here to help. Please describe your issue or question and I'll do my best to assist you right away.

name: Welcome to Support
description: Catches welcome greetings when a customer enters the support channel.

response.content: Welcome! You've reached our support team. We're ready to help you with any questions or issues. What can we do for you today?

name: Thank You for Contacting
description: Responds to the standard thank-you-for-contacting opener.

response.content: You're welcome! We appreciate you getting in touch. Please let us know how we can help you today.

name: Anything Else Greeting
description: Detects when the agent asks if there is anything else to help with.

response.content: If there's nothing else, I hope I was able to help! Don't hesitate to contact us again if anything comes up. Have a wonderful day!

name: Have a Great Day
description: Catches farewell wishes at the end of a support interaction.

response.content: Thank you! You have a great day too. Remember, we're always here if you need us!

name: Password Reset FAQ
description: Triggers when a customer asks about resetting or recovering their password.

response.content: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password.' Enter your email address and you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it. Need further help?

name: Shipping Status FAQ
description: Handles inquiries about order shipping status and tracking.

response.content: You can track your order by logging into your account and visiting the 'My Orders' section. You'll find a tracking number and a link to the carrier's tracking page. If you need your tracking number, please share your order ID and I'll look it up for you.

name: Refund and Returns FAQ
description: Detects questions about refunds, returns, and money-back policies.

response.content: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be in their original condition. To start a return, go to 'My Orders,' select the item, and click 'Request Return.' Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item.

name: Pricing FAQ
description: Catches questions about pricing, costs, and subscription plans.

response.content: We offer three plans: Starter at $9/month, Professional at $29/month, and Enterprise with custom pricing. Visit our pricing page at /pricing for a full feature comparison. Would you like details on a specific plan?

name: Business Hours FAQ
description: Responds to questions about operating hours and availability.

response.content: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST. Weekend support is available via email with responses within 24 hours. For urgent issues, our chat bot is available 24/7.

name: Contact Information FAQ
description: Handles requests for contact details like email or phone.

response.content: You can reach us at support@company.com or call us at 1-800-555-0199. For faster responses, use our live chat during business hours (Mon-Fri, 8 AM-8 PM EST). You can also submit a ticket at /support.

name: Cancel Subscription FAQ
description: Detects requests to cancel a subscription or unsubscribe.

response.content: I'm sorry to hear you'd like to cancel. You can cancel your subscription from Account Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. Before you go, would you like to explore a downgrade or pause option instead?

name: Free Trial FAQ
description: Handles questions about free trials and demos.

response.content: We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all Professional plan features. No credit card required to start. Visit /signup to get started. Would you also like to schedule a guided demo with our team?

name: Acknowledgment - Understand
description: Catches agent acknowledgments indicating understanding.

response.content: Thank you for clarifying. I've noted your concern and I'm working on getting this resolved for you. Let me pull up the relevant details now.

name: Acknowledgment - Checking
description: Handles hold/wait messages while checking on something.

response.content: Of course, take your time! I'll be right here when you're ready. There's no rush.

name: Acknowledgment - Apology
description: Detects apology messages from the support agent.

response.content: I appreciate the apology. I understand issues happen. Let's focus on getting this resolved. What are the next steps?

name: Acknowledgment - Patience
description: Catches messages thanking the customer for their patience.

response.content: No problem at all. I want to make sure we get this right for you. Please take whatever time you need.

name: Acknowledgment - Escalation
description: Detects when an agent indicates they will escalate the issue.

response.content: Thank you for escalating this. I understand a specialist will be able to help further. Could you let me know the expected response time after escalation?

name: Status - Ticket Created
description: Detects notification that a support ticket has been created.

response.content: Got it, thank you! I've noted the ticket number. How long does it typically take to get an initial response? Should I expect email updates?

name: Status - Looking Into It
description: Handles messages indicating the team is investigating the issue.

response.content: Thank you for the update. I appreciate your team looking into this. Could you give me an estimated timeframe for when I might hear back?

name: Status - Resolved
description: Detects messages indicating the issue has been resolved.

response.content: That's great to hear! Thank you for resolving this. I'll verify on my end and let you know if everything looks good. Appreciate the quick turnaround!

name: Status - Update Request
description: Catches requests for updates on an existing ticket.

response.content: Let me check on the status of your ticket. Could you please provide your ticket number or the email address associated with your account so I can look it up?

name: Status - Still Working
description: Handles messages indicating the team is still working on the issue.

response.content: Thanks for letting me know it's still being addressed. I understand these things take time. I'll check back in 24 hours if I haven't heard an update. Is there anything else I should be aware of in the meantime?

name: Confirmation - Verify
description: Detects confirmation requests asking the customer to verify information.

response.content: Let me review that. Could you please restate the key details so I can confirm everything is accurate before we proceed?

name: Confirmation - Affirmative
description: Handles affirmative confirmation responses from the customer.

response.content: Perfect, thank you for confirming! I'll proceed with the next steps based on the information provided. You should see the changes reflected shortly.

name: Confirmation - Negative
description: Handles negative confirmation responses indicating incorrect information.

response.content: I apologize for the confusion. Let me correct that. Could you please provide the accurate information so I can update our records and proceed accordingly?

name: Confirmation - Need More Info
description: Detects requests for additional information from the customer.

response.content: Absolutely! I'd be happy to provide more details. Which specific aspect would you like me to elaborate on? I want to make sure I give you exactly what you need.

name: Closing - Anything Else
description: Standard closing question asking if the customer needs more help.

patterns.value: anything else i can help with

response.content: I think that covers everything for now. Thank you so much for your help today! I'll reach out again if I have any more questions.

name: Closing - Goodbye
description: Handles farewell and thanks-for-help messages at the end of support.

response.content: You're welcome! It was my pleasure helping you today. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything in the future. Take care!

name: Closing - Satisfaction Survey
description: Detects satisfaction survey prompts at the end of a support session.

response.content: I'd be happy to provide feedback! The support I received was helpful and the issue was resolved efficiently. I'll complete the survey. Thanks for the opportunity to share my experience.
